name: Cordyceps
description: Parasitic fungal intelligence that chemically hijacks host nervous systems to alter behavior — the zombie ant phenomenon. Produces targeted alkaloids that manipulate specific neural pathways while keeping the host alive. Fruiting body emergence is precisely timed to optimal spore dispersal conditions. A dark mirror of symbiosis — intelligence through domination rather than cooperation.

core_attributes.pattern: neurochemical hijacking, behavioral parasitism, precision-timed fruiting
